meta.title: Datassist Trust Center | Information Security & Data Privacy
meta.description: Datassist Trust Center — our information security certifications, data privacy practices, security controls and compliance documents in one place.

hero.title: Datassist Trust Center
hero.subtitle: We protect your most sensitive and critical data as confidential and privileged at every level. Access our information security certifications, security controls and compliance documents here.

compliance.title: Compliance & Certifications
compliance.note: Audited and certified by independent organizations.

sections.title: Access our compliance documents
sections.description: The documents below are shared upon request. Select the relevant document to create an access request.
sections.requestNote: Some documents may require a non-disclosure agreement (NDA).

sections.title: Security validated by independent audits
sections.description: Our security and quality standards are periodically audited and certified by accredited organizations.

items.name: Information Security Management System
items.description: International standard ensuring the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information assets.

items.name: Quality Management System
items.description: Management standard based on process quality and continuous improvement.

items.name: Environmental Management System
items.description: Standard covering the systematic management of environmental impact.

items.name: Service Organization Controls
items.description: Independent assurance report on internal controls at service organizations.

items.name: Security Audit
items.description: Security audit performed periodically by independent auditors.

items.name: Personal Data Protection Compliance
items.description: Full compliance with legal regulations on the processing of personal data.

sections.title: Multi-layered security architecture
sections.description: We apply end-to-end controls at the infrastructure, application, organizational and process levels to protect your data. You can view the details of each category.

groups.title: Infrastructure Security
groups.summary: Multi-layered protection at the server, network and hosting layers.

controls.name: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
controls.desc: All external access points are protected against application-layer attacks by Web Application Firewalls.

controls.name: Secure Data Centers
controls.desc: Data is hosted in Tier 4 secure data centers across different geographic locations in Türkiye.

controls.name: Redundant Backup Infrastructure
controls.desc: Redundant backup infrastructure minimizes the risk of data loss for critical data.

controls.name: Network Segmentation
controls.desc: Network segmentation and firewall policies limit access between systems.

groups.title: Application & Product Security
groups.summary: Security and encryption throughout the application lifecycle.

controls.name: Penetration Testing
controls.desc: Penetration tests are conducted regularly by independent third parties.

controls.name: End-to-End Encryption
controls.desc: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest.

controls.name: Secure Development (SDLC)
controls.desc: Secure coding and code review practices are followed throughout software development.

controls.name: Vulnerability Management
controls.desc: Vulnerabilities are prioritized and remediated, and systems are updated regularly.

groups.title: Monitoring & Incident Management
groups.summary: 24/7 monitoring and defined incident response processes.

controls.name: 24/7 Security Monitoring
controls.desc: Systems are kept under continuous monitoring and surveillance.

controls.name: Centralized Log Management
controls.desc: Log records are collected centrally and subjected to security analysis.

controls.name: Incident Response
controls.desc: Defined incident response procedures enable a fast reaction to events.

controls.name: Anomaly Detection
controls.desc: Anomaly detection and alerting mechanisms catch suspicious activity early.

groups.title: Business Continuity & Recovery
groups.summary: Preparedness against outage and disaster scenarios.

controls.name: Business Continuity Plan (BCP)
controls.desc: Business Continuity Plans ensure operational resilience.

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP)
controls.desc: Disaster Recovery Plans provide readiness for emergency scenarios.

controls.name: Backup Testing
controls.desc: Backup and restore processes are tested regularly.

controls.name: Continuity Reviews
controls.desc: Service continuity targets are reviewed periodically.

groups.title: Organizational Security
groups.summary: People, process and audit-focused security management.

controls.name: SOC II Audits
controls.desc: Independent SOC II security audits are performed periodically.

controls.name: Awareness Training
controls.desc: Employees receive regular information security awareness training.

controls.name: Confidentiality Agreements
controls.desc: Confidentiality agreements and role-based responsibilities are defined.

controls.name: Risk Assessment
controls.desc: Regular risk assessment processes are run within the ISO 27001 framework.

groups.title: Access Management
groups.summary: Access control with least privilege and strong authentication.

controls.name: Role-Based Access (RBAC)
controls.desc: Role-based access control and the least-privilege principle are applied.

controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.desc: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory on critical systems.

controls.name: Privilege Reviews
controls.desc: Access privileges are reviewed at regular intervals.

controls.name: Privileged Account Auditing
controls.desc: Privileged accounts are continuously monitored and audited.

sections.title: Respect and transparency for your personal data
sections.description: We protect personal data processed in payroll and human resources operations in full compliance with KVKK and GDPR regulations.

cards.title: Data Residency
cards.text: Your data is hosted in secure, Tier 4 data centers located in different geographic locations within Türkiye.

cards.title: Legal Compliance
cards.text: All obligations under Turkish Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK) and the EU GDPR are met.

cards.title: Transparency
cards.text: The purpose, retention period and recipients of data are clearly stated through disclosure notices.

cards.title: Confidentiality
cards.text: Your sensitive and critical data is protected as confidential and privileged at every level with strict access controls.

sections.title: The subprocessors we rely on
sections.description: The key subprocessors we use to deliver our services and their purposes are listed below.

items.a: Your data is stored in secure, Tier 4 data centers located in different geographic locations within Türkiye. Redundant backup infrastructure is used for critical data.
We hold ISO 27001:2022, ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 certifications. We are also independently audited under ISAE 3402 and SOC II.

items.q: How do you ensure KVKK and GDPR compliance?
items.a: The processing of personal data is fully compliant with Turkish Law No. 6698 (KVKK) and GDPR. Disclosure notices, data processing agreements and retention processes are managed within this framework.

items.q: How do you manage security vulnerabilities?
items.a: Penetration tests are conducted regularly by third parties, vulnerabilities are prioritized and remediated, and systems are updated regularly.

items.q: How can I report a security incident?
items.a: You can report security concerns to us at kvkk@datassist.com. They are assessed as quickly as possible under our incident response procedures.

items.q: How can I access compliance documents?
items.a: You can create a request by selecting the relevant document in the Documents section. Some documents may require a non-disclosure agreement (NDA).

sections.title: Have a question?
sections.description: Our information security and data privacy team is happy to answer your questions.

footer.tagline: The world's best local payroll service provider.
